requirement: Define service hours, availability, RTO, RPO, backup frequency, and tested restore cadence.
Meet approved p95 interactive response and asynchronous report completion targets at agreed load.
Meet WCAG 2.2 AA with keyboard, screen-reader, non-colour status, and accessible PDF evidence.
Apply SSO/MFA-preferred and OWASP ASVS-aligned controls, scanning, secrets management, and penetration testing.
Keep append-only governed events for authentication, lifecycle, rights, evidence, imports, exports, and configuration.
Store UTC, display configured IANA site timezone, handle DST explicitly, and monitor time synchronisation.
Reject stale writes with optimistic concurrency and a clear refresh/compare workflow.
Validate, quarantine, malware scan, checksum, version, and access-control uploaded PDFs.
Apply minimisation, approved retention/legal hold, subject-access, export/redaction, and purge evidence.
Monitor health, queues/outbox, retries/dead letters, alerts, and degraded-mode behaviour.
Authorised users can withdraw an approved or released-but-not-effective instruction with reason, notification, and audit.
Authorised users can cancel a released/effective instruction while preserving an immutable marked original.
A new instruction can supersede an earlier one with explicit bidirectional links.
Visibility and notification timing are independent; offsets, quiet hours, retries, and deduplication are configurable.
Authorised users can create a timestamped offline briefing/compliance pack with checksums.
Approvers can nominate time-bounded delegates with a complete audit trail.
Supervisors can filter/chase outstanding acknowledgements without acknowledging for users unless explicitly authorised and audited.

Authenticated users receive one deterministic task inbox combining authorised reading, approval and operational recovery work, with saved display preferences, non-colour urgency, responsive accessibility and no count leakage.

Authorised readers can resume version-scoped PDF progress, use protected contents/previews/search and scoped adjacent/related navigation, while lifecycle changes prevent stale acknowledgement and preserve bounded reading evidence.
